rulings.Case Title: WENDY HENRIQUEZ VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, April 22, 2016, Line 5. DEFENDANT SALLY LIU Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service is GRANTED.
